insights.title: Review Unknown memories for missed patterns
insights.explanation: Unknown memories are not necessarily bad, but repeated Unknown patterns indicate classification blind spots or memory types that need explicit handling.
supportingEvidence: mem_d17b8d796c30: Supported agent frameworks include LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents, and custom agents.
mem_7ab2d2692b5c: Duplicate detection identifies semantically similar memories and outputs duplicate clusters.
mem_2d3101036ee6: Compression estimation reports the percentage of memories that could potentially be merged.
insights.estimatedImpact: Classifying 154 Unknown memories would improve composition metrics and downstream recommendations.
insights.recommendedAction: Sample Unknown records and decide whether to add rules or leave them as edge cases.

insights.title: Review category disagreements inside duplicate clusters
insights.explanation: Some highly similar memories disagree on category. This suggests taxonomy quality is less reliable than clustering evidence for those records.
insights.recommendedAction: Inspect reclassification candidates, especially Fact vs Preference vs Unknown conflicts; do not change labels automatically.

insights.title: Review duplicate clusters before cleanup
insights.explanation: There is meaningful redundancy, but cleanup should be targeted.
insights.estimatedImpact: Safely reduce memory volume by up to 6.91%.
insights.recommendedAction: Consolidate High-trust clusters first, then inspect unverified clusters.

insights.title: Remove exact duplicate memories first
insights.explanation: Exact duplicate groups are low-risk cleanup candidates because their content matches after normalization.
supportingEvidence: sample=To improve AI agents see arxiv paper: arxiv.org/pdf/2511.17332
insights.estimatedImpact: Exact duplicates can usually be collapsed with minimal semantic risk.
insights.recommendedAction: Deduplicate exact groups before reviewing semantic near-duplicates.

insights.title: Review cluster quality before trusting compression estimates
insights.explanation: Some clusters may be broad topical groups rather than true duplicate sets. They may still be useful, but should not drive automatic cleanup.
insights.estimatedImpact: Manual review determines whether compression estimates are trustworthy.
insights.recommendedAction: Audit the largest heterogeneous clusters before using them for cleanup.
